name: testSelectAcquirerDropdownFunctionality
description: Selecting the 'Select acquirer' field opens a dropdown with Acquirers list.
descriptionHtml: Selecting the 'Select acquirer' field opens a dropdown with Acquirers list.

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Selecting the 'Select acquirer' field opens a dropdown with Acquirers list.

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Verify: Dropdown list is not empty
